name: Rich Hall
bio: Rich Hall is an American comedian, writer and musician who first came to prominence as a sketch comedian in the 1980s, writing for the David Letterman show and appearing on Saturday Night Live. He coined the term sniglet for invented words. Long popular in the United Kingdom, where he lives, he won a Perrier Comedy Award in 2000 with his country-musician character Otis Lee Crenshaw and is a regular on panel shows such as QI.

timeline.ev: Wins an Emmy writing for the Letterman show
Cast member on Saturday Night Live
Wins the Perrier Comedy Award as Otis Lee Crenshaw
Hell No I Aint Happy DVD released
